data.title: ICICI Bank Confirms No Encumbrance on ICICI Prudential Life Shares in FY 2025-26
data.description:

ICICI Prudential Life Insurance Co. Ltd. ( (IN:ICICIPRULI) ) has issued an update.

ICICI Bank has informed stock exchanges and the audit committee of ICICI Prudential Life Insurance that, together with persons acting in concert, it has not created any encumbrances on its shareholding in the life insurer during the 2025-26 financial year. The disclosure, made under SEBI’s takeover regulations, underscores the absence of pledges or other restrictions on these shares, signalling a stable ownership position and providing clarity to investors and regulators on the insurer’s shareholding structure.

More about ICICI Prudential Life Insurance Co. Ltd.

ICICI Prudential Life Insurance Company Limited operates in India’s life insurance industry, offering a range of protection, savings, and investment-linked insurance products. It targets retail and corporate customers across the country, leveraging its parentage from ICICI Bank and Prudential to strengthen distribution reach and brand trust in the domestic financial services market.

City of London Investment Trust PLC ( (GB:CTY) ) has shared an update.

The City of London Investment Trust PLC has disclosed its holdings in other listed closed‑ended investment funds as at 31 March 2026, in line with UK Listing Rule 11.7.8. The trust reported that it holds an investment in 3i Group plc representing 0.27% of its total assets, providing investors with transparency over its exposure to other investment vehicles.

This disclosure underscores the trust’s regulatory compliance and offers stakeholders clearer insight into its portfolio composition and risk profile. By detailing its position in 3i Group plc, the trust gives income‑focused investors more information on how a small portion of its assets is allocated to another listed investment company within the broader market.

However, technical indicators suggest potential price weakness, and limited cash flow transparency poses some risk. Recent corporate events show management’s confidence, but the technical analysis and cash flow opacity weigh more heavily on the overall score.

The City of London Investment Trust PLC is a UK-listed closed‑ended investment trust managed by Janus Henderson Fund Management UK Limited. It focuses on building a diversified portfolio of listed securities to provide income and capital growth for investors, operating under the UK Listing Rules and investing primarily in publicly traded companies.

data.title: Ramsdens rolls out new LTIP to align senior pay with shareholder returns
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Ramsdens Holdings ( (GB:RFX) ) just unveiled an update.

Ramsdens Holdings has adopted its latest long-term incentive plan, LTIP 9, designed to reward management for performance over the three financial years to September 2028. The scheme grants options over 1p ordinary shares to five senior executives, including CEO Peter Kenyon and CFO Martin Clyburn, with awards exercisable at 1p per share subject to vesting.

The executive directors have received conditional awards over a combined 165,000 shares, while three other senior managers have been granted a further 110,000 shares, all subject to stringent performance conditions. Half of each award is tied to earnings per share growth and the other half to total shareholder return, underlining a strategy to align management incentives closely with shareholder value, supported by malus and clawback provisions.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:RFX) stock is a Buy with a £392.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Ramsdens Holdings stock, see the GB:RFX Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on RFX Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, RFX is a Outperform.

The score is driven primarily by solid financial performance (strong growth and improved profitability) but tempered by inconsistent cash conversion and FCF volatility. Technicals support the rating with a strong uptrend, though overbought indicators raise pullback risk. Valuation appears reasonable with a modest dividend, and the earnings call added support via upbeat FY26 guidance while acknowledging gold- and cost-related risks.

To see Spark’s full report on RFX stock, click here.

More about Ramsdens Holdings

Ramsdens Holdings is a growing, diversified financial services provider and retailer focused on foreign currency exchange, pawnbroking loans, precious metals trading, and the sale of new and second-hand jewellery. Headquartered on Teesside, it operates 172 UK stores alongside a growing online presence and is fully authorised by the FCA for pawnbroking, credit broking, and payments services.

data.title: Green Landscaping Group Calls AGM With Incentive Plan and Capital Mandates on Agenda
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Green Landscaping Group AB ( (SE:GREEN) ) has issued an update.

Green Landscaping Group AB has convened its shareholders to an annual general meeting in Stockholm on May 7, 2026, setting out participation requirements including Euroclear Sweden registration and advance notice, with additional steps for nominee-registered shareholders. The detailed agenda covers standard AGM business such as adoption of financial statements, profit allocation, discharge of board and CEO, board and auditor elections and approval of the 2025 remuneration report.

The board will also seek shareholder approval for a 2026–2029 warrant-based incentive programme for employees, and renewed authorisations to issue new shares or convertible instruments and to repurchase and transfer the company’s own shares. These proposals underscore the group’s intention to retain and incentivise key staff while preserving financial and capital-structure flexibility, potentially affecting future dilution, share liquidity and corporate governance dynamics for investors.

The most recent analyst rating on (SE:GREEN) stock is a Hold with a SEK41.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Green Landscaping Group AB stock, see the SE:GREEN Stock Forecast page.

More about Green Landscaping Group AB

Green Landscaping Group AB is a Swedish public company operating in the landscaping and outdoor maintenance sector, providing services such as green area management and infrastructure-related landscaping. The group primarily serves municipalities, property owners and infrastructure operators in the Nordic region, positioning itself as a consolidator in a fragmented market for long-term outdoor environment services.

data.title: Beyond Minerals Secures Full Interest in Ear Falls Lithium Project and Amends Financing Plan
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions

Beyond Minerals, Inc. ( (TSE:BY) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Beyond Minerals has secured a 100% undivided interest in the Ear Falls spodumene-bearing pegmatite exploration project in Ontario by making its final share and cash payments under an option agreement with Bounty Gold. The project remains subject to a net smelter return royalty and potential milestone payments tied to future mineral resource estimates, underscoring the strategic importance of Ear Falls in the company’s lithium portfolio.

In tandem, the company filed an amended offering document for a non-brokered private placement of up to 12,000,000 units at $0.05 each to raise as much as $600,000 under the listed issuer financing exemption. Proceeds are earmarked for working capital, exploration, and marketing, while Beyond Minerals also granted 66,667 restricted share units to a consultant, signaling ongoing efforts to fund growth and align incentives as it advances its Ontario lithium exploration strategy.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:BY) stock is a Hold with a C$0.06 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Beyond Minerals, Inc. stock, see the TSE:BY Stock Forecast page.

data.title: STLLR Gold Reports High-Grade Jonpol Intercepts in Tower Drilling Program
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

STLLR Gold ( (TSE:STLR) ) has shared an announcement.

STLLR Gold reported the first assay results from its 2026 drilling program at the Jonpol Deposit within the Tower Gold Project, highlighted by a high-grade intercept of 16.52 g/t gold over 5.85 metres and another interval of 1.46 g/t over 22.65 metres. These near-surface results exceed current average open-pit grades at Jonpol, reinforcing the geological model and indicating potential to expand higher-grade mineral resources.

The 2026 program, comprising roughly 8,000 metres of drilling in its first half, is aimed at extending Jonpol’s open-pit strike length from 400 metres to about 1,200 metres and de-risking the resource through infill drilling. Management says success could materially enhance Tower’s production profile and project economics by enabling earlier access to higher-grade open-pit mineralization, strengthening STLLR’s position in the Timmins gold camp and potentially benefiting future stakeholders in the project.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:STLR) stock is a Sell with a C$1.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on STLLR Gold stock, see the TSE:STLR Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on STLR Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, STLR is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by weak financial performance (no revenue, widening losses, and heavy cash burn), partially cushioned by low leverage and a stronger balance sheet. Technicals also weigh on the score due to a downtrend and negative momentum, with only oversold readings offering limited support. Valuation is constrained by negative earnings and no indicated dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on STLR stock, click here.

More about STLLR Gold

STLLR Gold Inc. is a Canadian gold exploration and development company focused on the Tower Gold Project in the Timmins Mining Camp in Ontario. The company’s activities centre on advancing open-pit and underground gold resources at deposits such as Jonpol on the Garrison Property, targeting higher-grade mineralization to improve project economics and long-term production potential.

data.title: Sona Nanotech’s Hyperthermia Platform Boosts Immunotherapy Response in Colorectal Cancer Study
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An announcement from Sona Nanotech Inc ( (TSE:SONA) ) is now available.

Sona Nanotech reported peer‑reviewed preclinical results showing its Targeted Hyperthermia Therapy, when combined with a standard PD‑1 inhibitor, produced durable responses in an immunologically cold colorectal cancer model. In animals that did not respond to immunotherapy alone, 100% responded when THT was added, and 38% remained alive and disease‑free at the end of a 45‑day study.

Management said these data, together with safety findings from a first‑in‑human melanoma monotherapy study, underpin plans for a clinical trial combining THT with immunotherapy. The results suggest Sona’s platform could improve outcomes in cancers that are typically resistant to checkpoint inhibitors, potentially strengthening the company’s position in emerging cancer immunotherapy adjuncts.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:SONA) stock is a Hold with a C$0.29 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Sona Nanotech Inc stock, see the TSE:SONA Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on SONA Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, SONA is a Neutral.

The score is primarily driven down by very weak financial performance (no reported revenue, persistent losses and cash burn, and a deteriorating balance sheet with slightly negative equity). Technicals also pressure the score with a clear downtrend and weak momentum indicators. Valuation contributes little support because the company is unprofitable (negative P/E) and no dividend yield is available.

To see Spark’s full report on SONA stock, click here.

More about Sona Nanotech Inc

Sona Nanotech Inc. is a nanotechnology life sciences company developing Targeted Hyperthermia, a photothermal cancer therapy that uses infrared-activated gold nanorods to deliver therapeutic heat to solid tumors. Its CTAB‑free gold nanoparticles are designed to enhance safety in medical applications and support both cancer treatments and diagnostic testing platforms.

data.title: Sekur Private Data Forms Strategic Advisory Board to Target U.S. National Security and Federal Markets
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Sekur Private Data ( (TSE:SKUR) ) has provided an announcement.

Sekur Private Data has formed a Strategic Advisory Board to deepen its push into U.S. national security and federal markets, initially targeting government and federal agencies, law enforcement, the intelligence community, defense, and special operations. The board is expected to expand in coming weeks, reflecting the company’s intent to broaden adoption of its secure communications solutions for Controlled Unclassified Information across multiple government sectors.

The company named its first two Strategic Advisory Board members, starting with Philip A. Oakley, a highly decorated former U.S. military intelligence officer with TS/SCI clearance, extensive experience at the Pentagon and key intelligence agencies, and a strong track record in federal technology sales. Oakley, who has overseen more than $1.6 billion in sales through his Service-Disabled Veteran Owned Business serving federal and intelligence clients, said Sekur’s investment in a federal-focused team and its technical differentiators position the firm for significant growth and credibility in the government CUI communications space.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:SKUR) stock is a Hold with a C$0.06 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Sekur Private Data stock, see the TSE:SKUR Stock Forecast page.

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, SKUR is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial performance (declining revenue, extremely large losses, and persistent negative free cash flow), partially offset by constructive technical momentum with price above major moving averages. Valuation is constrained by a negative P/E due to ongoing losses and no stated dividend support.

To see Spark’s full report on SKUR stock, click here.

More about Sekur Private Data

Sekur Private Data, Inc. is a Swiss-hosted cybersecurity and private communications provider focused on secure communications for enterprise, government, intelligence, and defense clients. The company offers secure and defense-grade communications solutions tailored to government and federal agencies, law enforcement, the intelligence community, and special operations, with an emphasis on handling Controlled Unclassified Information in sensitive environments.
